steps.t: Some new recruits have volunteered in Iridír after news of the attacks. Bâdarul has asked that you help supply them with weapons so they can begin the…
Arm the recruits in Iridír with the weapons they desire so that they can begin their training.
Return to Bâdarul in Iridír and inform him that you have armed the new recruits and they are not ready to begin training.
